summary: Post-S008 final deliverability gate passed. Current identifiable source-backed Devpilot backlog is closed, final API/CLI runtime gates passed, build/type-check prerequisites are green, and the direct judgment is deliverable with documented residual deployment/operator risks.
remaining_risks: Background process-manager integration for running the foreground CLI agent under systemd/launchd remains an operator/deployment responsibility outside repo-owned code.
No live production deployment exercise was run; readiness is based on automated API/CLI/Web build/type-check plus focused runtime/product gates.
